result.reasoning: The porterhouse clue points to the letter T. The first natural number starting with T is two (2). Three Dog Night's song "One" references this number in its lyrics. From the source text in the tool history, the first line that mentions two is "Two can be as bad as one". The casing is preserved exactly as provided in the authoritative source text. Applied casing rule: authoritative casing from source.
result.final_answer: Two can be as bad as one
